response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for the song '虎狼来' (Kororon). 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for the song portion, ensuring consistency with the provided translation. For the conversation portion (03:04 onwards), manual transcription and translation were performed as no reference was available. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal starts. Rapid-fire transitions and overlapping dialogue in the post-performance talk were handled with precise timestamps and logical grouping.

subtitles.original: 別に不満などないけれど
subtitles.english: Well, I’m not really dissatisfied,

subtitles.original: 描いた夢と違うけれど
subtitles.english: but bored by the view I’ve never dream

subtitles.original: なぜか心に穴が空いたようだ
subtitles.english: Somehow, I have sensed the anomaly, that my heart feels like having a hole in it

subtitles.original: 気づいてしまうから
subtitles.english: since I have realized it

subtitles.original: ありきたりな人生に
subtitles.english: And now I put a period

subtitles.original: 今ピリオドを打て。
subtitles.english: to my ordinary life.

subtitles.original: 爆ぜるようなこの気持ちが
subtitles.english: The emotion that is about to pop out,

subtitles.original: 抑えようもない衝動が
subtitles.english: and the impulse that can’t be restrained

subtitles.original: 望み通り叶わない
subtitles.english: Fail to come true as expected;

subtitles.original: 現実になってまだまだ
subtitles.english: still a long way to become reality

subtitles.original: くたばってなんかないぜ
subtitles.english: I won’t die

subtitles.original: 神に誓って泣いた思い出
subtitles.english: as my swear to the God calls back

subtitles.original: 実態ない将来に不安定で痛い
subtitles.english: Anxiety for that unstable future hurts

subtitles.original: 騒ぐ心の音を聞こう
subtitles.english: Listen to my heartbeat that makes noise gravely

subtitles.original: 夢の狭間で廃れぬよう
subtitles.english: It will never die out in the dream

subtitles.original: 足を止めていられぬよう
subtitles.english: and will never stop my pace

subtitles.original: 虎狼来 迷子ステイホーム
subtitles.english: “Kororon,” the child who gets lost should stay home

subtitles.original: 言葉では なんとでも言えるここが正念場
subtitles.english: I can say anything by word, and now is the critical moment

subtitles.original: そういや外野は 愛のない Dis カッション 派手にやってくれ
subtitles.english: The outsiders are simply making loveless discussion in a fancy way

subtitles.original: その結果が全てなんだ 許しがたいが
subtitles.english: Such a consequence is all the thing I can have, yet unforgivable

subtitles.original: チャンスは1回だ まだ生かしてくれよ世界の中
subtitles.english: Then with the only chance, let me live in this world

subtitles.original: 定かではないがまだ僕の中には
subtitles.english: Although it is uncertain, there are so many things

subtitles.original: 数 数多 余すこともない事実が
subtitles.english: in my mind that hard to tell

subtitles.original: 虎狼に飼いならされるこの毎日が
subtitles.english: I hate the routine that seems like being fed to tigers and wolfs

subtitles.original: 嫌 食べられて終い
subtitles.english: Meaning to pet them, but ending up with being eaten

subtitles.original: 実は不安しかないけれど
subtitles.english: To be honest, I can only feel upset inside,

subtitles.original: 描いた夢もないけれど
subtitles.english: being bored by the view I’ve never dream

subtitles.original: だから心に穴が空いたようだ
subtitles.english: Therefore, I have sensed the anomaly, that my heart feels like having a hole in it

subtitles.original: 気づいてしまった
subtitles.english: And I noticed it...

subtitles.original: ありきたりな人生に 今ピリオドを打て。
subtitles.english: And now I put a period to such an ordinary life.

subtitles.original: 爆ぜるようなこの気持ちが
subtitles.english: The emotion that is about to pop out,

subtitles.original: 抑えようもない衝動が
subtitles.english: and the impulse that can’t be restrained
